page: Vultr voc-c-32c-64gb-500s-amd is an instance in the Optimized Cloud Compute family, featuring 32 vCPUs and 32 physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC Genoa processor. Operating at a clock speed of 2.0 GHz, this x86_64 architecture server allocates 1.0 thread per core on a shared CPU basis. The processor includes a cache configuration of 32 KB L1d, 1.0 MB L2, and 32 MB L3 cache, alongside support for advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512, AVX512_VNNI, AVX512_BF16, and cryptographic acceleration via AES and SHA_NI.

The server is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. Local storage is bundled with a 500 GB NVMe SSD, offering high-speed local read and write capabilities. Network connectivity includes one complimentary public IPv4 address. No GPU hardware is present on this instance.

In benchmark testing, the server demonstrates strong processing capabilities. The stress-ng single-core CPU performance is rated in the top tier (top 10%) with a score of 3144.37, while the stress-ng multi-core CPU performance reaches 100519.25, placing it in the top 25% of tested servers. Given the 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and high-performance AMD Genoa architecture, this instance is suited for compute-heavy workloads, multi-threaded processing tasks, and database applications requiring fast local NVMe storage, though the shared CPU allocation should be factored into performance consistency expectations.
description: Vultr voc-c-32c-64gb-500s-amd is an Optimized Cloud Compute instance featuring 32 vCPUs and 32 physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC Genoa processor running at 2.0 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it includes 64.0 GB of RAM (2.0 GB per core) and a bundled 500 GB NVMe SSD for local storage. The CPU utilizes a shared allocation model and supports advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and AES cryptography. In benchmark evaluations, the server delivers top-tier single-core performance (top 10%) and strong multi-core performance (top 25%) via stress-ng. This hardware profile is optimized for compute-intensive workloads, multi-threaded applications, and database deployments requiring fast local storage.
og_description: Vultr voc-c-32c-64gb-500s-amd is an Optimized Cloud Compute instance with 32 AMD EPYC Genoa vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and a 500 GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier single-core and strong multi-core performance.
meta_description: Vultr voc-c-32c-64gb-500s-amd is an AMD EPYC Genoa server with 32 vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 500 GB NVMe SSD storage for compute-intensive workloads.
tagline: A 32-core AMD Genoa compute instance featuring 64 GB RAM and 500 GB NVMe storage for high-throughput multi-threaded workloads.

64.0 GB of system memory (2.0 GB per core)
Bundled 500 GB NVMe SSD local storage

Well-suited for compute-intensive, multi-threaded, and database workloads
